channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump reverses course on Cuban oil blockade, allows Russian tanker to pass
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- A Russian Tanker Tests The Limits of Trump’s Cuba Squeeze
- US will reportedly allow Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba amid blockade
- Trump Blinks As Russia Defies U.S. Blockade, Delivers Oil To Cuba
- White House says no change in Cuba policy after Russian tanker waiver
- Cuba to receive sanctioned Russian oil tanker as it struggles under US blockade
- Sanctioned Russian-flagged oil tanker closes in on Cuban port of Matanzas
- White House says no change in Cuba policy after Russian tanker waiver
- White House says no change in Cuba policy after Russian tanker waiver
- Why Did the U.S. Allow a Russian Oil Tanker Through Its Cuba Blockade?
- As Trump Squeezes Cuba, U.S. Military Exists in a Bubble
- Cuba waits for Russian oil tanker to arrive amid US blockade
- Allowing Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba 'not a policy change,' White House says
- White House says no change in Cuba policy after Russian tanker waiver
- Russia ‘glad’ oil cargo reached its ally Cuba amid U.S. blockade
- Letting Russian tanker through, Trump declares ‘Cuba is finished’
- Russian tanker delivers oil to Cuba despite US pressure on Havana — envoy
- US allows Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba
- Russian oil tanker nears Cuba despite US sanctions as Trump says he sees “no problem”
- Russia to continue to work on oil supplies to Cuba: Kremlin
- Russian oil shipment reaches Cuba: Putin challenges Trump's oil war with entry in crisis-hit island
- Russia ‘glad’ oil shipment reached Cuba
- Aid to Cuba from Russia: arrival of Russian oil tanker, energy crisis in region
- Russian oil tanker reaches Cuba after Trump appears to loosen blockade
- Trump says 'no problem' for Russian tanker to deliver oil to Cuba
- Trump says he has ‘no problem’ with Russian oil tanker bringing relief to Cuba despite blockade
- Russian Oil Tanker Arrives in Cuba After Trump Shrugs Off His Own Fuel Blockade
- Urgent: Russian crude oil tanker arrives in Cuba -- report
- Russian oil tanker has arrived in Cuba, Interfax reports
- Russian tanker nears Cuba, defying US oil blockade
- Trump eases Cuba oil blockade, clears Russian tanker
- US does not oppose humanitarian oil supplies to Cuba, including from Russia — Trump
- US lets Russian oil tanker approach Cuba despite blockade
- Russian tanker nears Cuba, defying US oil blockade
- Russian tanker nears Cuba with much-needed oil as Trump softens tone
- US lets Russian oil tanker approach Cuba despite blockade
- US Has No Problem With Russian Oil Tanker Sending Supply to Cuba, Trump Says
- Trump says he has 'no problem' with Russian oil tanker bringing relief to Cuba despite blockade
- Trump says he has ‘no problem’ with Russian oil tanker bringing relief to Cuba despite blockade
- Russian tanker heads to Cuba despite U.S. oil blockade
- U.S. allows Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba after months of blockade
- ‘No problem’: Trump on Russian oil tanker reaching Cuba despite US blockade
- Russian tanker approaches Cuba despite US oil blockade
- Trump signals US will allow Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba
- Russian tanker nears Cuba with much-needed oil as Trump softens tone
- Trump says he has 'no problem' with Russian oil tanker bringing relief to Cuba]]>

- Trump says US could 'take oil in Iran' and seize Kharg Island

- Trump suggests US could take Iran’s Kharg Island
- Trump says US could 'take the oil' in Iran

- Trump suggests U.S. could take Iran's Kharg Island
